pull.title: Add FullAgg (DahLIAS) module
pull.body:
This PR adds a FullAgg module implementing full aggregation of BIP 340 signatures using the interactive aggregate signature scheme ([DahLIAS](https://eprint.iacr.org/2025/692)).

The implementation follows the [BIP draft](https://github.com/fjahr/bips/pull/4).

Left-over TODOs:

- [ ] Share duplicated code with the MuSig module (see TODO comments)

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

verification.payload:
tree 2f2780d751241eb94d1f862c360692c8aae03147
parent ebf594320dc838b9de1abb54d5ba98cef84f4297
author Fabian Jahr <fjahr@protonmail.com> 1757454700 +0200
committer Fabian Jahr <fjahr@protonmail.com> 1783626646 +0200

refactor: Move parsing helpers from musig to eckey

The naming of these functions suggested they should be moved to group.h
but this didn't seem practical since these functions depended on eckey.h
internally which is higher level than group.h.

events.message:
refactor: Move parsing helpers from musig to eckey

The naming of these functions suggested they should be moved to group.h
but this didn't seem practical since these functions depended on eckey.h
internally which is higher level than group.h.
